Performed computations beyond data-gathering scope (including continuing to compute after sufficient facts were fetched)
Provided final answers/explanations or narrative summaries instead of emitting only bare tool calls/results
Used the wrong tool for the phase (e.g., used calculator/unit_converter instead of knowledge_lookup)
Failed to use knowledge_lookup as required or omitted necessary lookup calls
Queried invalid or unsupported topics or parameters (e.g., non-allowed topic names)
Incomplete coverage of required entities/facts (missed cities, countries, or constants)
Redundant or duplicate lookups for the same topic (violated one-call-per-topic rule)
Performed unit conversions with disallowed tools or with invalid/mismatched units
Topic naming or formatting mistakes (e.g., case sensitivity/capitalization mismatches)
Did not gather required conversion facts upfront when conversions are part of data collection
